base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of menu_ui — a ui (menu_screen) from 1997 final fantasy vii. Main menu + equip/magic/status/materia/party/PHS rotate screens. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
